zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fiennes II於1357年8月1日出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟時，他的父親William Fiennes I27歲，母親Joan de Saye32歲。他於大約1381年與Elizabeth Batisford在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1405年1月13日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭易亞斯特 素可韋斯特 迪恩哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fiennes II于1357年8月1日出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟时，他的父亲William Fiennes I27岁，母亲Joan de Saye32岁。他于大约1381年与Elizabeth Batisford在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1405年1月13日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰易亞斯特 素可韋斯特 迪恩哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fiennes II was born on 1 August 1357, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, his father, William Fiennes I, was 27 and his mother, Joan de Saye, was 32. He married Elizabeth Batisford about 1381, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 13 January 1405, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fiennes II est né le 1 août 1357, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Fiennes I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Saye, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Batisford environ 1381, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1405, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fiennes II am 1. August 1357 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fiennes I 27 und seine Mutter Joan de Saye 32. Er hat um 1381 in England Elizabeth Batisford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 13. Lui sposato Elizabeth Batisford circa 1381, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: William Fiennes IIが1357年8月1日にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで生まれた時，父William Fiennes Iは27歳，母Joan de Sayeは32歳であった。約1381年にイギリスでElizabeth Batisfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1405年1月13日に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエアスト スセックスウエスト ディーンアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Herstmonceux, Eas: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 웨스트 디 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: William Fiennes II(이)가 1357년 8월 1일 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fiennes I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Saye(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1381년 영국에서 Elizabeth Batisford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1405년 1월 13일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 웨스트 디 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fiennes II nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1357, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fiennes I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Saye, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Batisford aproximadamente 1381, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1405, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saints Churchyard, West Dean, East Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Herstmonceux, Eas: алл сеинц чурчярд, вест дин, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fiennes II родился 1 августа 1357 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fiennes I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Saye, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Batisford около 1381 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 13 января 1405 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, вест дин, эаст суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
